summary: A short vertical PSA for the Alien Registration Requirement (ARR) with an 'ARR / Facing the Consequences' logo card, captioned voiceover narration over stock B-roll of handcuffs over a fingerprint and prison-bar shadows, ending on a USCIS.gov/alienregistration card. The captions transcribe the spoken warning ('If you fail to comply...') rather than song lyrics; it is a narration-driven threat/compliance PSA, not a music-driven or genre-styled youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FACING THE CONSEQUENCES; If you fail to comply, for civil and criminal enforcement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
